Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType
public class DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType extends Object
DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType

Describes the contents of a document and how it is used

    • of

      public static DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType of(String value)
      Returns a DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as DocumentInvestorDocumentDocumentType
